top_signals.title: US Air Force awards first CCA production contracts to General Atomics, Anduril

top_signals.title: Jio Platforms eyes low-orbit satellite rollout as Starlink awaits India launch
top_signals.summary: Jio Platforms, India's largest telecom operator and digital services company, wants to rollout statelite communication in the country where Starlink still awaits launch.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Time for a Berkshire Sundance in the Ascot finale
top_signals.summary: ROYAL Ascot 2026 comes to a close with the longest race of the week, the Queen Alexandra Stakes (6.10pm), run over two-miles-five-and-a-half furlongs. It goes without saying that you need a stamina laden contender to have a chance in this so it’s perhaps not surprising that this race has been dominated by jumps trainers in [...]
